name: resume-tailor
description: Hybrid AI + manual workflow for tailored resumes, rendered through a Typst microservice.

scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:rebuild:compiler: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml stop compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml rm -f compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml build --no-cache compiler && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d compiler
